block_01: Sometimes it may seem as though only those who studied economics or finance have the capacity to handle financial operations. But the truth is, everyone needs to have a good level of financial literacy to manage their funds in their daily life.
block_02: What does it mean to be financially fluent and how to measure it? Why is it important? In this article we look at the key steps on your way to economical proficiency.
block_03: If one of your goals for 2022 is becoming better with money, this article is for you. This material is part two of our financial literacy series before the new year. Check the full article for helpful tips and information.
